Operation 'createSprint' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original summary and description are overly generic and lack actionable detail. The improved version specifies: (1) the workspace context for the sprint, (2) expected inputs including the workspace_id parameter and request body requirements, (3) the return value (Sprint object with 201 status), (4) side effects (sprint state initialization), and (5) domain context (iteration container for agile management). This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Create a new sprint
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new sprint in workspace
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new sprint within the specified workspace for organizing and tracking work items. Requires the workspace_id path parameter and sprint configuration details in the request body (such as name, start date, end date, and goals). Returns the created Sprint object with a 201 status code. The sprint will be initialized in an active or planning state depending on configuration. This operation establishes a new iteration container for agile project management.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are overly generic and lack actionable detail. The improved version specifies: (1) the workspace context for the sprint, (2) expected inputs including the workspace_id parameter and request body requirements, (3) the return value (Sprint object with 201 status), (4) side effects (sprint state initialization), and (5) domain context (iteration container for agile management). This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
